summary: Excellent segue into a soaring The Other One, though recording details are unclear
review: The reviewer raves about the seamless transition from “He’s Gone” into an extended, noodle‑filled jam that erupts into The Other One, calling it "SO GOOD!". No comments were made about the source or clarity of the recording, so its technical quality remains unknown.

ai_rating.rationale: A single detailed 4‑star review praises a standout segue and The Other One; lack of any recording‑quality feedback keeps the rating moderate with medium confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No specific comments on soundboard, audience mix, clarity, or other technical aspects.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Highlights a thrilling segue from "He's Gone" into The Other One with extended noodling by Phil, Billy and Mickey.

band_member_comments.Phil: Praised for extended noodling during the segue
